isolation.state: stateless - each HTTP request is independent

frictions.description: Server running in mock mode (OPENROUTER_API_KEY not configured) limits end-to-end API testing
frictions.resolution: Used direct function calls and unit tests to verify verification logic works correctly

frictions.description: Mock response generates 'x+2=5' for all questions, not calculus-specific expressions
frictions.resolution: Verified verification functions work correctly through direct testing and unit tests

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed. Calculus verification (derivative and integral) works correctly via symbolic computation using nerdamer and mathjs. Graceful degradation for unsupported problems and malformed LaTeX works as expected - returns 'partial' status without crashing. All unit tests pass (37 verification tests + 39 edge case tests).
